lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you all right?

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: Who goes there?

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: Arr! A landlubber!

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: Begone afore I take my cutlass to ye! I've been charged with guardin' this gate and no noodle-armed landlubbers will make it past me alive!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's not a cutlass.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think it's a twig.

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: Ye cheeky begger! I was wavin' my finger at ye!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: All right...

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: Arrr... just 'cos me body happens to be 50% wood does not mean I'm heartless.

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: I got a bag of 'em here. Wanna see?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I'll pass.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What happened to you?

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: That be a tale so heart-wrenchin' that it has so far wrenched the hearts from over a dozen sturdier men than thee!

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: A tale of such woe that none but the stoniest hearts can hear it without sheddin' a single, poignant tear...

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: And I'll never tell ye, not even if ye wore an item, such as a ring, with powers of mind control!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What if I said please?

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: Hmmmm...well alright...

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: Wait, no!

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: Get goin' landlubber before I take my splintery foot to yer behind!

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: Well ye seem like a [lad/lass] that can handle such a tale...so I'll tell ye...

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: Well, it all starts with this albatross...

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: Wait, never mind, I'll skip forward a bit.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you sure?

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: I have to [lad/lass], Cap'n Donnie will flay what little is left of me if I told ye.

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: But anyway, I got recruited to the zombie pirates along with the rest of the crew in an unspecified incident involvin this albatross.

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: We was sailin' along happily, and I was partakin' of a little 'rum' in the crows nest.

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: Well, we hit either a really rough wave or some rocks.

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: Twas kind of hard for me to tell which, as I was well out of it by then!

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: Regardless I toppled from the crows nest into the water.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is that how you got so badly injured?

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: No [lad/lass]!

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: What happened next was that I discovered a new, previously uncharted reef of hard, spiky coral.

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: I made a mental note of its location, and to this day it is still marked on our fleet's charts as Lukes Reef.

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: I managed to grab a hold of our ship, the Inebriated, as it passed overhead.

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: And then I discovered another, taller, spikier reef of even sharper and more painful coral.

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: To this day it is still marked on our fleet's charts as The Other 50% Reef.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Owwwwwwwww...

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: It gets worse...

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: When they hauled what was left of me on deck, they dropped me onto the floor while they decided what to do with me.

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: Bear in mind this would be on a ghost ship, the planks of which sweat a thick mixture of stagnant water...and pure salt crystals.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh...my...god...

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: But on the good side, all my thrashin' and pained squealin' settled the matter in the Captain's mind, and he had the shipwright carve me half a body out of his Witchwood Planks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Witchwood? What's that?

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: Tis a special, magical wood from a now extinct tree.

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: Once they nailed it all in place the stuff moves like it is part of me body.

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: The stuff will also grow back if it breaks, which is dead handy!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, that stuff must be very valuable!

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: Arr! That it be!

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: So, that be the tale of how I managed to lose precisely 50% of my body.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: There there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So how flammable are you?

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: What kind of a question is that?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A rather rude, personal one?

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: Ye've got that right!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll soon have you out of the way! Burn!

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: Don't make me angry! Ye'll not like me when I'm angry!

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: Let that be a lesson to ye!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: My world is an ocean of paaaain!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what is going on here anyway?

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: Ye expect me to talk?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No Mr. Luke, I expect you to die!

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: Hah! I'm one step ahead of ye!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Egad, outsmarted by the man with the wooden brain.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But seriously, what is going on here?

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: I can't tell ye [lad/lass].

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: The Cap'n would have me whittled down to toothpicks if I did.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well if you can't tell me, perhaps you could show me through the medium of Interpretive Dance?

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: No. Just...no.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Mime?

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: Look, [lad/lass] I'm not tellin' ye a thing! So clear out while ye still can!

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: Arr! Tryin' ter get away eh? Well ye'll never sneak past me, I'm the best lookout this crew has ever seen!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who's that making faces behind you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That is the most amazing thing I have ever seen!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is that your distraction?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who is that behind you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey you! Look over there!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh my! Is that a genuine 3rd Age Diversion?

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: Where?

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: Hey! What are you doing out there?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing.

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: Well Cap'n Donnie said no livin' landlubbers were allowed out of the compound.

lines.speaker: 50% Luke
lines.text: So get yerself back in here, or yer for it!
